hero.headline: Control Plane for AI-Powered Development
hero.subheadline: Govern Cursor, Claude Code, Copilot — all from one dashboard. 4-Gate quality pipeline. Full audit trail.

features.title: Key Features
features.subtitle: Everything you need to govern AI-generated code

gateEngine.title: Gate Engine
gateEngine.description: 4-gate quality pipeline with OPA policies. Block non-compliant code before it ships.

evidenceVault.title: Evidence Vault
evidenceVault.description: SHA256 hashed artifacts. 8-state lifecycle. Full audit trail for compliance.

aiContext.title: AI Context Engine
aiContext.description: Stage-aware prompts for Cursor, Claude Code, Copilot. Reduce feature waste 60%→30%.

policyGuards.title: Policy Guards
policyGuards.description: Semgrep SAST + AI-specific security rules. OWASP ASVS Level 2 compliant.

step2.title: Configure
step2.description: Choose the right policies and gates.

step3.title: Ship
step3.description: AI validates every PR. Full audit trail.

vietnamFounders.title: For Vietnam Founders
vietnamFounders.heading: AI Code Generation
vietnamFounders.subtitle: IR-based Codegen - From idea to first product
vietnamFounders.description: You don't need Cursor or Claude Code. AI Code Generation is built into the platform, helping you build your first product in ~30 minutes* with full audit trail.
vietnamFounders.disclaimer: *Typical for simple CRUD apps. Time varies by project scope.

features.compliance: VN regulatory compliance (BHXH, VAT, Labor Law)

gettingStarted.title: Get Started with SDLC Orchestrator
gettingStarted.subtitle: Follow these simple steps to set up and run your first project in minutes.

step1.title: Create an Account
step1.description: Sign up for a free account to access the dashboard and all basic features.

step2.title: Connect Repository
step2.description: Connect your GitHub repository to start tracking and managing your code.

step3.title: Configure Quality Gates
step3.description: Set up quality gates to ensure code compliance before merging.

step4.title: Install Tools
step4.description: Install VS Code Extension and CLI tool for better productivity.

step5.title: Upgrade to Founder
step5.description: Unlock AI Code Generation, Evidence Vault and all premium features.
